raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Calm context opener","name":"What feels most important to talk through today, Carlos?","description":"Lets Carlos set the agenda before any feedback lands.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Quality in examples","name":"What does good brand design look like in your work right now?","description":"Surfaces his current quality bar in concrete terms rather than abstractions.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recent work sample","name":"Which recent piece of work best shows your current standard?","description":"Pulls out a specific example that can be used to anchor feedback.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Feedback changed what","name":"What changed in your work after the last round of feedback?","description":"Checks whether prior feedback translated into behavior, not just agreement.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Concrete expectations","name":"What do you think the bar is for a junior brand designer here?","description":"Surfaces his own read of expectations and success criteria at his level.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Work slowing you down","name":"What part of your growth feels most blocked right now?","description":"Identifies the main constraint on near-term development.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback to action","name":"What kind of feedback actually changes how you work?","description":"Finds the conditions under which feedback becomes usable behavior change.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Practice next","name":"What one practice do you want to focus on for the next few weeks?","description":"Narrows growth into a single near-term habit or skill to apply immediately.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What would make that practice easier to stick with?","description":"Surfaces the support or adjustment needed to make the development focus real.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next step agreement","name":"What should we agree you will do before we next meet?","description":"Closes on a concrete commitment without reopening new topics.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
